sub_gate_a_predicate: 08-containerapp-update-result.provisioningState == 'Succeeded' AND 08-containerapp-update-result.latestRevisionName is a non-empty string (BOTH-not-OR). Single-path.
sub_gate_b_predicate: 10-revisions-list-after-fix.json contains at least one record with healthState == 'Healthy' AND trafficWeight == 100 (BOTH-not-OR). Record-scoped iteration. Single-path.
sub_gate_c_predicate: 12-curl-after-fix.requests_ok == 10 (strong) or >= 8 (fallback). Dual-path: this is the only Gate 32 sub-gate with dual paths because the curl floor tolerates transient cold-start variance without weakening the recovery claim. Per Oracle Q1 directive — dual-path only where equivalent manifestations of the same claim exist.
sub_gate_d_predicate: 11-acr-repository-list-after-fix.json contains 'labacr' AND 11-acr-repository-show-tags-after-fix.json contains 'v1' (BOTH-not-OR). Record-scoped membership. Single-path.

post_fix_kql_observation.rationale: Per Oracle Q5 directive: post-fix KQL silence is INFORMATIONAL ONLY and is NOT promoted to a Gate 32 sub-gate. The Gate 32 PASS verdict is anchored to sub-gates (a)-(d) (update succeeded with revision, Healthy revision with traffic=100, curl requests OK, ACR repo and tag present) - not to ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL row count, which may surface 0 rows during the lab capture window due to platform-side ingestion lag (typically 2-5 minutes for newly-materialized custom tables).
